perturbation.original_text: (a) The term “ Affiliate ” shall have the meaning provided such term in the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 Act, as amended (the “ 1934 Act ”) and, for avoidance of doubt, includes your subsidiaries and Affiliates.
perturbation.changed_text: (a) The term “ Affiliate ” shall only include entities where there is at least fifty-one percent (51%) ownership of voting equity by you or any of your subsidiaries. For entities where ownership is less than fifty-one percent (51%), the term "Affiliate" shall only apply if explicitly designated in writing by you to the Company.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction regarding the definition of 'Affiliate.' The original definition refers to the Securities Exchange Act, encompassing subsidiaries and Affiliates more broadly. The modified definition, however, restricts 'Affiliate' to entities with at least 51% ownership or those explicitly designated in writing by the user, contradicting the original understanding. This creates uncertainty regarding which entities are bound by the confidentiality agreement, especially concerning entities with minority ownership but otherwise closely related to the user.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. Use of Evaluation Material . You and each individual or entity you provide access to the Evaluation Material agree: (a) to use the Evaluation Material solely for the purpose of determining whether you wish to enter into any possible Transaction and the terms thereof, and (b) subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, to keep the Evaluation Material strictly confidential, and not to disclose or use any of the Evaluation Material in any manner inconsistent with this Confidentiality Agreement; provided, however , that any of such information may be disclosed to your Affiliates (as defined in Appendix A hereto) and the Representatives (as defined in Appendix A hereto) who need to know such information for the sole purpose of helping you evaluate a possible Transaction. You agree to be responsible for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by any of your Affiliates and the Representatives.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the definition of 'Affiliate' to be more restrictive than the original text and introduces specific ownership requirements. The contradicted text allows disclosure of evaluation materials to 'Affiliates (as defined in Appendix A hereto)'. Since the changed text narrows the definition of Affiliate, this creates a contradiction by limiting the scope of entities to which confidential information can be disclosed, which contradicts the original intention of a broader definition that was initially aligned with the Securities Exchange Act.

perturbation.original_text: 6. No Solicitation . For a period of one (1) year following the date of this Confidentiality Agreement, you will not, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, except that you shall not be deemed to be in violation of this provision as a result of any such employee who: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein.
perturbation.changed_text: 6. No Solicitation . For a period of one (1) year following the date of this Confidentiality Agreement, you will not, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, except that you shall not be deemed to be in violation of this provision as a result of any such employee who: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein. Furthermore, you are allowed to solicit any employee after 6 months of this agreement.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces a contradiction by adding a clause that allows solicitation after 6 months, directly conflicting with the initial statement prohibiting solicitation for a period of one year. This creates uncertainty regarding the actual duration of the no-solicitation agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. No Solicitation . For a period of one (1) year following the date of this Confidentiality Agreement, you will not, directly or indirectly, solicit for employment any officer, director, or employee of the Company or any of its subsidiaries or divisions in an executive or management level position or who is otherwise considered by the Company (in its sole discretion) to be a key employee, in each case, with whom you have had contact or became known to you in connection with your considerations of a Transaction, except that you shall not be deemed to be in violation of this provision as a result of any such employee who: (i) initiates discussions regarding such employment without any direct or indirect solicitation by you or (ii) responds to any public advertisement or search firm communications that are not directed specifically to any of the Persons described herein. Furthermore, you are allowed to solicit any employee after 6 months of this agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds a sentence stating that solicitation is allowed after 6 months, which directly contradicts the original statement in both the original text and the contradicted text that prohibits solicitation for one year following the agreement date. This creates a clear inconsistency and uncertainty regarding the duration of the no-solicitation agreement, fitting the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within ten (10) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within thirty (30) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder. However, destruction of material can be extended to 60 days if an email is sent to the company requesting an extension.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation creates a contradiction by changing the return/destruction timeframe to 30 days, adding an extension of 60 days if an email is sent to the company requesting an extension, while the initial text specified 10 days. This in-text conflict raises ambiguity over the timeframe for destruction or return of materials and how to get an extension on that timeframe.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5. Return or Destruction of Evaluation Material . If you decide that you do not wish to proceed with a possible Transaction, you will promptly inform the Company of this decision. In that case, or at any time upon the written request of the Company for any reason, you will, and will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives to, within thirty (30) days after the request, destroy or return all Evaluation Material and no copy, extract, or other reproductions thereof (including electronic copies) shall be retained. No such termination will affect your obligations hereunder or those of the Representatives. If requested by the Company, you will, and will cause the Representatives to, provide written certification to the Company that all such material (including electronic copies) has been returned or destroyed in compliance with this Confidentiality Agreement. Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, you and the Representatives shall continue to be bound by their obligations of confidentiality and other obligations hereunder. However, destruction of material can be extended to 60 days if an email is sent to the company requesting an extension.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the timeframe for returning or destroying evaluation material, initially 10 days in the original text, to 30 days and introduces a potential extension to 60 days upon request. This directly contradicts the implication in the contradicted text that there's a fixed 30-day period and adds a new condition for extension that wasn't present before. The contradiction arises from the inconsistencies related to return deadlines. The perturbation explanation confirms this inconsistency leads to ambiguity and is an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof and be governed by Texas law.
perturbation.changed_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof, but automatically extends for another year unless either party provides written notice of termination at least 30 days prior to the initial two-year anniversary, and is governed by Texas law.
perturbation.explanation: The added clause introduces a contradiction regarding the termination of the confidentiality agreement. The initial text states it terminates after two years. The added clause states the agreement automatically extends for another year if there isn't a written notice, creating uncertainty regarding the actual term of the agreement. This contradicts the initially agreed upon end date of 2 years.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 12. Term . Unless explicitly stated otherwise herein, this Confidentiality Agreement will terminate two (2) years from the date hereof, but automatically extends for another year unless either party provides written notice of termination at least 30 days prior to the initial two-year anniversary, and is governed by Texas law.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the agreement terminates after two years. The changed text introduces an automatic extension, creating a contradiction regarding the termination of the confidentiality agreement. This contradicts the initially agreed upon end date of 2 years as now the agreement can be extended, making the contradicted text inaccurate.

perturbation.original_text: 14. Repositories . The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Evaluation Material to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 14. Repositories . The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Evaluation Material to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto. However, any specific confidentiality provisions within a data room's terms of service relating to data room usage will take precedence over this agreement with regards to access logs and user activity monitoring within the data room only.
perturbation.explanation: The added clause introduces a contradiction. While the original text states the confidentiality agreement controls over any additional requirements from repositories, the added clause states specific provisions within a data room's terms of service take precedence. This creates an inconsistency regarding which agreement governs confidentiality requirements related to data room usage. The contract now contradicts itself on which rules apply to the Data Room.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 14. Repositories . The terms of this Confidentiality Agreement shall control over any additional purported confidentiality requirements imposed by any offering memorandum, web-based database or similar repository of Evaluation Material to which the you or any of the Representatives is granted access in connection with the evaluation, negotiation or consummation of the Transaction, notwithstanding acceptance of such an offering memorandum or submission of an electronic signature, “clicking” on an “I Agree” icon or other indication of assent to such additional confidentiality conditions, it being understood and agreed that its confidentiality obligations with respect to Evaluation Material are exclusively governed by this Agreement and may not be enlarged except by a written agreement that is hereafter executed by each of the parties hereto. However, any specific confidentiality provisions within a data room's terms of service relating to data room usage will take precedence over this agreement with regards to access logs and user activity monitoring within the data room only.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that the Confidentiality Agreement controls over any additional requirements from repositories. The changed text introduces an exception, stating that specific provisions within a data room's terms of service take precedence regarding access logs and user activity monitoring. This directly contradicts the original statement and creates an inconsistency regarding which agreement governs confidentiality requirements related to data room usage and access logs, as the changed text creates an exception that was not there before.

perturbation.original_text: 10. Remedies . It is understood and agreed that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by you, your Affiliates or the Representatives, and that the Company shall be entitled to equitable relief, including injunction and specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach or threat thereof. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Confidentiality Agreement and shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: 10. Remedies . It is understood and agreed that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by you, your Affiliates or the Representatives, and that the Company shall be entitled to equitable relief, including injunction and specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach or threat thereof. Such remedies shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Confidentiality Agreement and shall be in addition to any others specifically listed.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation causes an in-text contradiction. The original text states that equitable relief is *in addition* to all other remedies, but the changed text states that such remedies are *exclusive*. The text now includes contradictory information about the available remedies, thus making it unclear whether equitable relief is the sole recourse or is in addition to all other remedies.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 10. Remedies . It is understood and agreed that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by you, your Affiliates or the Representatives, and that the Company shall be entitled to equitable relief, including injunction and specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach or threat thereof. Such remedies shall be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Confidentiality Agreement and shall be in addition to any others specifically listed.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself regarding the exclusivity of remedies. The original states equitable relief is 'in addition' to other remedies, while the changed version says such remedies are deemed 'exclusive.' This creates a strong contradiction as it's unclear whether the company can pursue other remedies or if equitable relief is the sole recourse. The contradicted text is an exact copy of the changed text meaning the text is contradicting itself.
